## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What workflow or limitation does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, or links if helpful.
